description: Complex: validate input data, convert valid records to markdown, and generate a summary report
prompt: Process this user data: [{"id":1,"name":"Alice","email":"alice@example.com","role":"admin"},{"id":2,"name":"Bob","email":"invalid-email","role":"user"},{"id":3,"name":"","email":"charlie@example.com","role":"user"}]. First validate all records. Then convert only the valid records to a markdown table. Finally, generate a report summarizing the validation and conversion results.
